_comment: Manifest for `playground deploy-all` (playground-cli >= 0.33): all six arcade apps in one batch invocation. `dir` is relative to this file; `buildDir` is relative to `dir`. The five games share ONE project dir with per-game config baked in at BUILD time (active.ts + arcade.config.json + cdm.json), so deploy.sh builds each game sequentially into its own dist-<domain> and runs deploy-all with --no-build; the dashboard builds normally into dist.
